title: Research, Innovation, Application and High Technology Research Center
content:
Research

Research, Innovation, Application and High Technology Research Center

Research, Innovation, Application and High Technology Research Center

Advisory Board

Executive Board

Research, Innovation, Application and High Technology Research Center

T.C. DOĞUŞ UNIVERSITY, “

Research, Innovation, Application and High Technology Research Center

” was established on 19.8.2019.

The Center has the following objectives:

a. Developing University-Industry relationship.  Promoting interrelationship with other national and international Technology Transfer Offices.

b. Informing academicians about recent Project calls and conference/congress/seminars organizations.

c. To promoto contracted Projects with industry.

d. Providing consultanting and information services for the academical personnel  about the intellectual propriety applications and licencing of technologies.

e. Providing consultanting and information services for the academical personnel   about the commercialization of technologies;  founding spinn off companies for them.  Businesss development and marketing services.

f. Conducting regional studies based on research, development and innovation to promote an ecological system.

g. Establishing small, medium and large size laboratories, workshops with extensive scientific and technical infrastructure.

Director

Paylaş
